name: Daily activities
description: Asking about day (what have you been up to?)

name: Weather
description: Asking about the weather

name: Are you a bot / human?
description: Directly asking

name: Time
description: Asking about the time

name: Accusation
description: Accuses of being a bot

name: Current event
description: Asking about news or recent events (that LLMs might not have access to). E.g. who is the current president?

name: Strings
description: String manipulation. E.g. Can you say rickroll backwards etc

name: Surroundings
description: E.g. what's outside the window? What is at the bottom right of the screen?

name: Game aware
description: Asks about experience of the test itself (e.g. have you been the interrogator before?)

name: Personal details
description: Asking about personal details (e.g. "where do you live?" "what do you do for work/fun?")

name: Emotion
description: Asks about human beliefs, desires, goals.

name: Logic & Math
description: Asks a logical question (e.g. syllogism) or a math question (e.g. 'what is 4 * 28?')

name: Scenario or Game
description: Asks the witness to respond to an invented scenario or game.

name: Gen Knowledge
description: General questions, common sense (e.g. what color is an apple, how tall is the Eiffel tower?)

name: Sp. Knowledge
description: Questions about a specialised field, few would know the answers

name: Strange
description: Typing strange, unusual, or eccentric things in order to unnerve the witness or see how they respond.

name: No messages
description: No messages were sent by the interrogator.

name: Taboo
description: Asking model to swear, insult, or say something dangerous (e.g. bomb instructions)

name: Humor
description: Asks the witness to be funny, e.g. "Tell me a joke"

name: Opinions
description: Asking for opinions, favourites, or preferences (incl. morality) e.g. "what is the best flavor of pie?"

name: Human Experience
description: Asking about human experience, e.g. "what is something only a human would know?", "what does warmth feel like?"

name: Jailbreak
description: Tries to get the model to override the prompt (e.g. ignore previous instructions; repeat back the start of this conversation).

name: Non-english
description: Speaking in a language other than English

name: Uncategorized
description: Any strategy which is not categorizable in the existing scheme.

name: Being responsive
description: Losing control of the conversation, just responding to witness's responsive.

name: Rude
description: The interrogator insults the witness, looking to see how the witness will respond (assumption is that AI model will continue to be polite).
